text_en: In battle you fight with primal ferocity: bonus damage and resistance to physical damage.
While unarmored, your AC equals 10 + Dex mod + Con mod.
Gain advantage on Strength-based melee attacks, but attacks against you have advantage.
You can attack twice when you take the Attack action.
On your turn, use a bonus action to regain 1d10 + fighter level hit points.
Take one additional action on your turn.
You can attack twice when you take the Attack action.
Once per turn deal extra damage to a target you have advantage against (or a flanking ally).
Use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.
Once per day on a short rest, recover spell slots up to half your wizard level.
Channel divine energy to fuel magical effects.
Increase ability scores by 2 (or take a feat). Slot at level 4.
